build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && npm run build:desktop-runtime

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://127.0.0.1:3001 http://localhost:3001 http://127.0.0.1:5173 http://localhost:5173 https://login.microsoftonline.com https://graph.microsoft.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; form-action 'none'
